_meta: UNVERIFIED SEED. These animationId -> Emotion entries are model-relative to the human/standard dialogue chat-head only and are seeded from public sources, not yet confirmed against the live OSRS cache. Non-human heads (trolls, ogres, children, monsters) use different ids and currently fall through to NEUTRAL. Confirm and correct each id via the debugMode chat-head dump described in expression-emotions.README.md. Any animationId absent from this map, and -1, resolves to NEUTRAL.
